V1.label: V1 ge sub-if
V1.precreate:
configure
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 vlan-id 100
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# network-services vrf instance urpf_v1b_vrf
NCP3-nog(cfg-netsrv-vrf-inst)# interface ge400-0/0/34.100
NCP3-nog(cfg-netsrv-vrf-inst)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# commit
Commit succeeded by dnroot at 20-Apr-2026 03:53:12 UTC
NCP3-nog(cfg)# end
NCP3-nog#
V1.build_to_s5_log:
configure
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf mode loose
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf allow-default disabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf address-family ipv6 admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf address-family ipv6 allow-default enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# commit
Commit succeeded by dnroot at 20-Apr-2026 03:54:04 UTC
NCP3-nog(cfg)# end
NCP3-nog#

!
